Powerful racers the world over have crossed the sea to be
here, including Montjeu, the one who defeated El Condor
Pasa.

Among Japan's racers, the Golden Generation's Special
Week has garnered the most attention.
With the world as her opponent, will she deliver today?
All racers have entered the gate.
The race of the century, the Japan Cup...
Begins now!

Before a crowd of 140,000, our fine racers blast out of the
gate.

Unusual for her, Special Week is running at a slower pace,
her position a little behind the middle of the pack.

As for the favorite to win, Montjeu, she's directly behind
Special Week, her eyes glued to the Japanese racer!
So Special Week is her mark after all...
Yes...
Spe...

The pack has entered the backstretch, with the lead
separating themselves from the pack.
The fearsome Montjeu is currently in second to last place.

While the Ruler of Japan Special Week is currently
positioned here.
Such a slow pace...

The timing of her spurt will be the key, so all I can do is
wait...

With 1,000 meters remaining, they head into the third
corner.

With each racer watching the others, just who will make
the first move?!
What's this?! Special Week is picking up speed!
So you went with an early spurt after all!

From behind! Montjeu is in fast pursuit! Our two headliners
have made their moves!

Passing the zelkova tree, the rest of the pack likewise
picks up the pace! They're all pushing towards the front!

From the outside, it's Special Week! Special Week from
the outside! But Montjeu's following straight behind!
We're heading into the final straightaway!
The pack is fanning out! Four hundred meters to go!
Hraaaaaugh!

Montjeu's pulling ahead! Montjeu from the outside! She's
closing in on Special Week!

The world's strongest is closing in on Japan's Special
Week!
Both you and El Condor Pasa possess incredible talent.
But unfortunately for you, I possess even more!
Tch... This might be it...
Special Week! You can do it!
You can't lose, Special Week!
That's right! Spe still has a chance!
C'mooon! Show us what the best racer in Japan is made of!
Just a little more to the finish line!
Speee!
Huff... huff... huff... huff...
With this body, I carry the dreams of many.

The dreams of my moms, the dreams of my teammates, my
friends, my trainer, and all my fans...
I'm running with all those dreams.
And I want to be a racer...
worthy of them!
URRRRAAAAUUUUGH!
Huh?! Tch...
But Special Week doesn't slow down!
Special Week has taken the lead!
Special Week is in the lead!
So this... is a racer of Japan!

Montjeu speeds up! From the inside comes the hero of
Hong Kong! The star of the UK follows behind!

But still in the lead is Special Week! Special Week
maintains her lead!
I wanna WIIIIIN!
The first across the finish line, number thirteen...
Special Week!
Huff... Huff... Huff...
Proving herself as Ruler of Japan, Special Week has won!
Team Sirius has won its first Japan Cup!
Special Week has taken on the world... and won!
Huff... Huff... Ehehe...
